title: Piège pour Cendrillon
writer: Sébastien Japrisot, André Cayatte, Jean Anouilh
actors: Dany Carrel, Madeleine Robinson, Hubert Noël
plot: The young Michèle Isola, who is about to inherit a fortune from her godmother, scarcely survives a terrible fire. When she regains consciousness it becomes evident she suffers with amnesia.
